task_statement: P1 raw evidence stream secret/PII scrub repair for the BRICK 6-surface audit repair goal. Use official build route only; preserve Brick/Agent/Link boundaries and support-evidence proof limits.

nodes.work_statement: Design the P1 raw evidence stream secret/PII scrub repair from current evidence. Open the P1 phase doc and source audit docs. Inspect the active raw writer chain for raw/brick-work.jsonl, raw/agent-received.jsonl, raw/agent-return.jsonl, and raw/adapter-error.jsonl or the active equivalent. Decide block vs redact vs mark as a design proposal only. Return reading_scope_map, invariants, checker/verifier plan, and policy questions. Do not edit files.

Implement P1 only, using the design handoff. Repair raw evidence stream persistence so credential/secret/PII-looking payloads cannot silently enter raw BRICK JSONL streams. Add checker-first negative probes covering the active raw stream writer seams for at least raw/brick-work.jsonl, raw/agent-received.jsonl, raw/agent-return.jsonl, and raw/adapter-error.jsonl or active equivalent. Preserve Brick/Agent/Link boundaries: Support/evidence integrity only; no source truth, success judgment, quality judgment, Movement authority, scheduler/queue/retry, new axis, or broad product release/dashboard hardening. Preserve evidence refs, proof_limits, and not_proven when body detail is removed. Do not recursively ban ordinary nested words such as status/result in non-secret evidence. Run focused checks and git diff --check.

Attack the P1 implementation. Build independent synthetic raw payload probes for API key/token-looking strings, private-key-like blocks, provider/session-body-like strings, and credential-looking env assignments. Drive real writer/checker surfaces, not only source search. Verify allowed non-secret evidence still persists with proof_limits and refs. Return observed failures/gaps without judging success or Movement.

Attack the P1 implementation for Brick/Agent/Link boundary leakage. Verify the repair remains Support/evidence integrity and does not make Support own Brick work truth, Agent return truth, Link Movement, success, or quality. Confirm phase:P1 does not accidentally implement phase:P4 AgentFact authority-key closure or phase:P7 release/dashboard hardening.

Inspect the P1 evidence outputs and checker proofs. Verify persisted raw/claim/evidence outputs still carry useful refs, proof_limits, and not_proven after any block/redaction/mark behavior. Confirm negative probes cannot pass by simply dropping required raw evidence. Record stale-source or checker-overclaim risks.

Close P1 from accumulated evidence only. Separate observed_evidence, narrowly_proven, not_proven, remaining_delta, parent_goal_delta_status, next_target_candidates, deferred Smith/COO review queue, and transition_concern_evidence. Do not approve quality, choose Movement, or call the overall BRICK repair goal complete. State whether P1 is narrowly proven or HOLD with policy questions.
